title: myosotis palustris var. strigulosa
intro: Myosotis palustris var. strigulosa, also known as marsh forget-me-not or strigose forget-me-not, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Myosotis palustris var. strigulosa include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote optimal health.
